title: AI Linter Configuration Schema
description: Configuration schema for .ai-linter-config.yaml - Validation tool for AI skills and agent configurations
$comment: Migrated from Draft-07 to Draft 2020-12. Uses unevaluatedProperties for stricter validation.

logLevel.$comment: Log level for controlling output verbosity

restrictedSeverityLevel.$comment: Restricted severity level (ERROR or WARNING only)

log_format.$comment: Controls how log messages are formatted for different use cases

max_warnings.description: Maximum number of warnings before linter fails. Use -1 for unlimited warnings
max_warnings.$comment: Use -1 for unlimited warnings, 0 for strict mode, or any positive value

ignore.description: Glob patterns for files and directories to ignore during validation. Supports standard glob patterns: *, ?, [seq], [!seq]
ignore.$comment: Glob patterns matching against directory and file paths

code_snippet_max_lines.description: Maximum number of lines allowed in a code snippet before warning. Prevents bloated AI context
code_snippet_max_lines.$comment: Encourages externalizing large code blocks to separate files

prompt_dirs.description: Directories containing prompt files to validate
prompt_dirs.$comment: Relative paths to directories for prompt validation

agent_dirs.description: Directories containing agent configuration files to validate
agent_dirs.$comment: Relative paths to directories for agent configuration validation

resource_dirs.description: Resource directories to check for unreferenced files. All files in these directories should be referenced somewhere in markdown files
resource_dirs.$comment: Files in these directories must be referenced in markdown documentation

unreferenced_file_level.description: Log level for unreferenced files in resource directories
unreferenced_file_level.$comment: How to handle files not referenced in markdown

missing_agents_file_level.description: Log level for missing AGENTS.md file in project root
missing_agents_file_level.$comment: How to handle missing project context file

report_warning_threshold.description: Warning threshold (0.0-1.0) for content length. Files that reach this percentage of the limit will show a warning in the report
report_warning_threshold.$comment: Percentage of limit that triggers warning (0.8 = 80%)

prompt_max_tokens.description: Maximum token count for prompts in prompt_dirs. Uses cl100k_base encoding (OpenAI's GPT tokenizer)
prompt_max_tokens.$comment: Token limit for prompt files to prevent context overflow

prompt_max_lines.description: Maximum line count for prompts in prompt_dirs
prompt_max_lines.$comment: Line limit for prompt files for readability

agent_max_tokens.description: Maximum token count for agents in agent_dirs. Uses cl100k_base encoding (OpenAI's GPT tokenizer)
agent_max_tokens.$comment: Token limit for agent configuration files

agent_max_lines.description: Maximum line count for agents in agent_dirs
agent_max_lines.$comment: Line limit for agent configuration files

skill_max_tokens.description: Maximum token count for skills. Uses cl100k_base encoding (OpenAI's GPT tokenizer)
skill_max_tokens.$comment: Token limit for skill files to prevent context overflow

skill_max_lines.$comment: Line limit for skill files for readability

enable_mandatory_sections.description: Enable or disable checks for mandatory sections in AGENTS.md files

mandatory_sections_log_level.description: Log level for missing mandatory sections in AGENTS.md. Only applies if enable_mandatory_sections is true
mandatory_sections_log_level.$comment: Only ERROR or WARNING allowed (not INFO)

mandatory_sections.description: List of mandatory sections that must be present in AGENTS.md files. Case-insensitive for matching

enable_advised_sections.description: Enable or disable advice-level recommendations for additional sections in AGENTS.md

advised_sections.description: List of advised (optional but recommended) sections for AGENTS.md files. Missing sections trigger advice-level messages. Case-insensitive for matching
advised_sections.$comment: Optional but recommended sections for comprehensive AGENTS.md

ignore_errors.description: Configuration for ignoring specific error patterns using regular expressions. Useful for false positives and patterns that shouldn't be validated.
ignore_errors.$comment: Error exclusion patterns - each error code can have a list of regex patterns to ignore

file_link_not_found.description: List of regex patterns to exclude from file-link-not-found validation. Patterns are matched against the file link text. Use this for patterns like paths with variables, template tags, or false positives.

items.$comment: Regular expression pattern to match against file links

file_link_not_found.$comment: Regex patterns to exclude file links from validation
